who: dispatch coordinators for construction contractors processing 10–20 timesheets/week
offer: For dispatch coordinators for construction contractors processing 10–20 timesheets/week, inefficient timesheet compilation causes payroll delays. We automate timesheet summaries instead of manual timesheet entry and compilation.
problem: Inefficient timesheet compilation leading to payroll delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for dispatch coordinators
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to dispatch coordinators with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try manual entry and summary generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing timesheet data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
